title: alchemilla vulgaris proles strigosula
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris proles strigosula, also known as Lady's Mantle, is a perennial herb belonging to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alchemilla vulgaris proles strigosula include treating menstrual cramps, heavy bleeding, and menopausal symptoms, as well as soothing digestive issues and reducing anxiety. The herbal preparations of Lady's Mantle include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
